dsl_rule.translation_notes: Long-Legged Doji pattern identified by: (1) body near zero (open ≈ close), (2) upper_wick exceeding average ATR_14, (3) lower_wick exceeding average ATR_14. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Entry applies to both long and short since pattern indicates indecision/reversal. Exit conditions inferred from author silence: reverse direction on next candle close indicates reversal confirmation.

backtest_rule.reason: Long-Legged Doji pattern identified by: (1) body near zero (open ≈ close), (2) upper_wick exceeding average ATR_14, (3) lower_wick exceeding average ATR_14. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Entry applies to both long and short since pattern indicates indecision/reversal. Exit conditions inferred from author silence: reverse direction on next candle close indicates reversal confirmation.

source_rule_text: Long-Legged Doji: A reversal pattern where opening and closing prices are the same or very close, with both upper and lower shadows taller than average shadow length
